metadata.title: Manager.money - Personal Finance
metadata.description: A modular personal finance web application for managing EV costs, living expenses, and savings.

home.title: Manage Your Money
home.subtitle: A modular personal finance application to help you make better financial decisions.

ev.title: EV Calculator
ev.description: Calculate and compare electric vehicle charging costs
ev.pageDescription: Calculate and compare electric vehicle charging costs. Plan your EV expenses efficiently.
ev.comingSoonDescription: This module is under development. Check back soon for EV cost calculations.

livingCost.title: Living Cost
livingCost.description: Track and manage your monthly living expenses
livingCost.pageDescription: Track and manage your monthly living expenses. Get insights into your spending habits.
livingCost.comingSoonDescription: This module is under development. Check back soon for expense tracking features.

savings.title: Savings
savings.description: Plan and track your savings goals
savings.pageDescription: Plan and track your savings goals. Build your financial future with smart saving strategies.
savings.comingSoonDescription: This module is under development. Check back soon for savings tracking features.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to access your account
auth.signInDisabled: Sign-in is currently disabled. Please contact an administrator.
auth.name: Name
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

error.title: Authentication Error
error.description: Unable to sign in at this time
error.message: Sign-in is currently disabled or an error occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js. Deployed on Cloudflare.
